resources.string: Skin and cape controls only appear when a Microsoft profile session is available.
Please sign in with Microsoft at least once before installing Minecraft. After that, offline mode stays unlocked.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
CurseForge needs an API key before it can load.
CurseForge could not load. Make sure your API key is configured.
Install %1$s into this instance as %2$s for Minecraft %3$s / %4$s? Required dependencies will be installed automatically.
Install flow for %1$s is not wired yet.
The downloadable content manager will be wired here next. This screen already receives the selected instance and selected content tab.
This version will be installed for Minecraft %1$s / %2$s. Required dependencies will be installed automatically.
Edit the same built-in controller options available from the in-game settings button.
When Minecraft touch gestures are enabled, double-tapping the empty look area sends the Drop key.
Older controller mods might require this example Controllable 1.20.1.
Allows empty-screen touch taps and long presses to send Minecraft attack/use gestures. Turn this off if you only want touch buttons and camera movement.
Configure built-in controller mapping, on-screen touch controls, and SDL controller routing.
Show or hide on-screen controls and manage imported/custom touch layouts.
Create a clean instance with its own loader, version, icon, saves, and mods.

Fabric creates a modded loader profile and a mods folder for the selected instance. With isolated mode on, saves/mods/config stay in the instance folder while version files are cached and protected by the launcher.

Forge downloads and runs the Forge installer, creates a Forge loader profile, and prepares a mods folder for the selected instance. With isolated mode on, saves/mods/config stay in the instance folder while version files are cached and protected by the launcher.
Pick the Minecraft version first. Loader versions update automatically.
No image picker is available on this device.

Disabled: This creates an instance under .minecraft/instances with its own saves, mods, config, logs, options, resource packs, and shader packs.\n\nEnabled: This installs only to the shared/global version. Version folders may still be cached under .minecraft/versions either way, but isolated-owned cache entries are hidden/protected from the Shared tab.
Choose the mod loader for this instance. Vanilla has no loader.
Vanilla uses the selected Minecraft version directly.
Pick a loader version before creating this instance.
Choose the exact loader build to install.
An instance named %1$s already exists. Choose another name.
The default name is the Minecraft version plus loader, for example 1.21.11 (Vanilla). Edit the name to use a custom instance name.
NeoForge installer support is not available for this build.
NeoForge uses the selected Minecraft version plus the selected NeoForge build. Isolated mode separates saves/mods/config/options while version files can still be kept in the protected shared cache.
No versions are loaded for this category yet. Refresh the manifest and try again.
Isolated mode separates the user data folder which creates its own custom instance.
Unable to find the selected version in the manifest.
Custom/offline skins unlock after Microsoft sign-in is completed once.
Using Microsoft skin for the signed-in account.
This permanently deletes %1$s and every file inside this instance folder, including saves, mods, configs, logs, resource packs, and shader packs. Folder: %2$s This cannot be undone.

The shared vanilla files for %1$s are still required by these installed loader versions: %2$s Forge, Fabric, Quilt, and NeoForge versions can inherit files from the matching Vanilla version. Deleting the Vanilla folder would break those launches. Delete the dependent loader versions first, or keep this Vanilla version installed.
This permanently removes the shared/global version %1$s from .minecraft/versions. Folder: %2$s This cannot be undone. Shared libraries and assets are kept because other versions may still use them.

Before using DroidBridge, you must accept that Minecraft usage is subject to the official Minecraft EULA and related usage guidelines. You do not need to read the EULA now, but it is available below for review.
Shows real-time FPS on the floating settings button while the game is running.
Shows a small live latest-log overlay on the left side while Minecraft is running. Useful for debugging crashes without covering the full game screen.
Choose the default corner. Dragging the button in-game saves a custom position until it is reset.
Shows a small floating settings button while Minecraft is running. Tap it to open the in-game button overlay. You can hide it after your controls are configured.
Remove base Minecraft version after loader install

Recommended: keep this on so Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge can keep using their inherited Minecraft base version. Turn it off only if you intentionally want to remove the inherited base version after installing a loader.
Keep inherited vanilla after loader install
Remove inherited vanilla after loader install

When enabled, new Fabric/Forge installs copy the needed vanilla client jar into the loader profile, flatten the inherited JSON, then delete the vanilla version folder only when no other installed loader version still needs it. This does not make libraries/assets per-instance; those remain shared launcher cache files.
Keep installing in background and show notification
Shows an ongoing progress notification while Minecraft, Fabric, Forge, or NeoForge installs continue in the background.
Shows an ongoing progress notification while loader installs continue in the background.
Android notification permission is off. Turn this on to approve notifications and show background install progress.
Please wait while DroidBridge checks installed content from Modrinth and CurseForge.
This will permanently delete this item from the instance:\n\n%s
Update %1$d installed item(s)? Old files will be replaced and this cannot be undone.
Manual files cannot be updated automatically yet.
This file has no Modrinth or CurseForge metadata, so DroidBridge cannot check it for updates.
Update checking for %s is not wired yet.
Updates are not available for this content type.
Unable to open this folder directly on this device.\n\n%s
Unable to rename because the instance folder was not found.
Shared version instances cannot be renamed from here because other instances may depend on them.
Create and launch isolated instances. Each instance has its own saves, options, mods, resource packs, shader packs, config, and logs.
Modpack export is not wired yet.
This link is not available yet.
Keep a copy of game logs
latestlog.txt does not exist yet. Launch the game once first.
Signed-in player profile. Opens account settings.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Available now: %1$d MB (%2$.1f GB). Device total: %3$d MB (%4$.1f GB). Tap the RAM value to enter a number manually.
Enter RAM in MB. Maximum allowed right now: %1$d MB.
Choose one of the official capes owned by %1$s, or hide the current cape.
This Microsoft account did not return any owned capes. Custom cape uploads are not supported by the normal Minecraft profile API.
Hide the active cape on the Minecraft profile.
Sign in with a Microsoft account before changing capes.
Cape updated. It may take a moment to appear everywhere.
Please sign in with Microsoft before installing Minecraft.
Please sign in with Microsoft once before using offline mode.
This will update the real Minecraft: Java Edition skin for %1$s. The change can appear in Minecraft, the official launcher, and other launchers after Minecraft Services refreshes.
Invalid skin. Use a 64x64 or 64x32 PNG skin.
Microsoft skin is not cached yet. Tap Refresh Microsoft account / skin.
Sign in with a Microsoft account before changing the Microsoft skin.
Choose the skin model to use for this Minecraft account. Use Classic for Steve-style arms, or Slim for Alex-style arms.
No file picker is available on this device.
Select at least one mod to remove.
Manage .jar mods for this %1$s instance. Mods folder: %2$s
This is a Vanilla instance. Mods will only load after you create or install a loader version such as Fabric, Forge, Quilt, or NeoForge.
Set MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID and MICROSOFT_REDIRECT_URI in app/build.gradle before using sign-in.
Install this version before launching it.
Native launch bridge invoked. Replace LauncherBridge with your real JVM/LWJGL renderer backend to execute Minecraft.
Vanilla %1$s installed. You can launch it now.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Android is blocking JavaLauncher notifications. Open app notification settings and allow notifications if you want visible background install progress.
JavaLauncher can show Minecraft, Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge install progress while the app is in the background. This is useful for slower downloads and long loader installs.
This removes the offline profile and its local skin. Your Microsoft account will stay remembered.
Choose the username and optional PNG skin used by this offline profile.
Enter a Minecraft username for offline play. This is only available because Microsoft sign-in was completed on this device.
No custom skin. Minecraft will use the default offline skin.
Selected skin will be saved to this offline account.
Create and select offline profiles for no-internet play. Your Microsoft account stays remembered as the verified online account.
No offline accounts yet. Create one for no-internet play.
Offline mode becomes available after this device has completed Microsoft sign-in at least once.
Quick Play is only supported on Minecraft 1.20 and newer.
Render surface set to %1$s. Restart the game for it to take effect.
Allows for Minecraft to be rendered on an alternative native Android SurfaceView which can help with some GPU bound scenarios.\nThis is not recommended for certain mods like VulkanMod.
No renderer was found. Krypton should be available from the embedded launcher libraries.
Renderer plugin APK/cache files cleared. Installed plugin apps were not uninstalled.
Select an installed renderer plugin first.
Could not open this renderer plugin app or app settings.
No file picker is available on this device.

%1$s needs the MobileGlues folder selected before launch.

Pick the MG folder so the launcher can write the MobileGlues config here:
%2$s
Renderer set to %1$s. Restart the game for it to take effect.
Could not open Android storage access settings.
Legal links for Minecraft usage terms, DroidBridge privacy information, and DroidBridge terms of service.
Allows the gameview to ignore rounded corners of your device by adding a small inset.
When enabled, Minecraft uses immersive fullscreen and ignores safe areas like notches and punch-holes.
Ignores the camera cutout on certain devices.
Enter a value from %1$d%% to %2$d%%. 100%% uses the normal screen size.
Lower values improve performance; higher values improve image quality. Changes apply the next time Minecraft starts.
Grant Android microphone permission so Simple Voice Chat and other voice mods can access the mic while Minecraft is running.
Shared installs are older/global versions stored under .minecraft/versions. Turn this off to show isolated instances only.

This will remove the saved Microsoft account from this device and clear the cached Microsoft login session. Offline profiles will stay saved, but they will be locked until Microsoft sign-in is completed again.
Android microphone permission is already granted for DroidBridge. Simple Voice Chat can request microphone input while Minecraft is running.
Microphone permission was denied. Simple Voice Chat will show Microphone unavailable until the permission is enabled. You can allow it from Android App Info if the prompt no longer appears.
Status: Microphone permission is not granted.
Simple Voice Chat needs microphone permission before launch. Grant it, then press Play again.
Unpacks authlib-injector and nide8auth into the launcher game home.
Unpacks the Cacio/Caciocavallo desktop compatibility files.
Unpacks launcher support jars and patch files into the app data components directory.
Unpacks LWJGL classes and natives into the app-private files directory.
Storage is not mounted. Please check app storage access and restart DroidBridge.
Signed out. Offline mode is unlocked because Microsoft login was completed once.
The default storage location cannot be removed.
This only removes the storage location from DroidBridge. It will not delete any Minecraft files from the folder.
Select where JavaLauncher should install new game files. Only folders that resolve to a writable file path can be used for Minecraft installs.
Choose where new game files should be installed. Existing instances keep using the storage folder they were created in.
Storage folder picker is not available on this device.
For Minecraft 26.x and newer only, this currently allows your device to use OpenGL.
Use Turnip (Adreno Only) driver with Zink
Forces the launcher to use the system Vulkan driver. Only affects Zink or mods that utilize this.
Choose a version type, pick a version from the list on the right, then install it.
Choose which Turnip/Adreno driver Vulkan Zink uses when the system Vulkan driver toggle is off. Default Mesa keeps the launcher bundled setup; installed driver plugins use their native driver folder.
